approach: tracked_opens table (deterministic per-recipient token; distinct-profile opens via opens>0 row count). Dispatcher injects /o/<token> 1x1 pixel + pre-creates tracked_opens row (opens=0) ONLY when link_tracking on (same opt-in as click tracking). Public GET /o/:token returns 43-byte transparent GIF + bumps opens, never throws. buildUnsubscribeUrl carries broadcast_id/campaign_id on body link AND List-Unsubscribe header; unsubscribe POST writes email_events type=unsubscribe (new broadcast_id/campaign_id cols) attributed to source send. listBroadcasts adds opened+unsubscribed (workspace-scoped).
